name: Double-Decker Cheese Melt
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, blend the shredded cheddar cheese and softened butter.
2. Add the egg, garlic salt, and onion salt to the food processor; process for 1 minute or until creamy.
3. Spread about 2 tablespoons of the mixture on each slice of bread.
4. Stack two slices of bread together with the cheese side up for each sandwich.
5. If desired, sprinkle paprika over the sandwiches.
6. Cut each sandwich in half diagonally.
7. Place the sandwiches on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 400°F for 12-15 minutes or until golden and bubbly.
